'''Tetsu''' was a companion to a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual. When the Force-user employed the [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] [[Sense Path]] to divine their future, they had a vision of Tetsu, crying and scared, standing atop a column of rock half a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] wide in the middle of a [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]].
